raw_input:
[4.0/5] Nothing spectacular. I have received more... for this price. This Hair Removal Device by Ulike just as well as a couple of other IPL devices I have that cost much less. It comes packaged nicely, though I kept trying to open the flat two-sided green piece that covers the accessory side. It doesn't open.
The device does look quite fancy, and I was interested in skin rejuvenation, which is in one of the photos (that is mentioned in the other listing that shows this exact same device). The instruction booklet contains about as much as the empty listing page that I ordered it from. That page has no bullet points, only one photo.
They do have another listing for this same exact device, showing the accessories, extra photos with bits of information, and bullet points telling a little about it. I got my information from there.
The device does have the cooling feature, as many others do, which helps it not to zap too badly. It also comes with a razor and eye protection.
What it lacks, that many others include that are in or around this price range, is more attachments for the device. There needs to be at least one smaller light head for use around the lip area, as it's very hard to use the main one with the device being so large.
This IPL device works pretty much as well as any other, with none having the ability to make you completely hair-free at any point in the future. As far as the studies that I have seen, with diligent use, home IPL devices can only offer a little better than 50-60%-ish less hair.
My preferred device, which costs very little more than this one, has several attachments, including some specifically for skin rejuvenation. You do get a fancy box with this device, and it looks nice, but I don't think it provides any more or less than devices that cost much less.
I haven't found one yet that really only takes 10 minutes to do your legs, but if I ever do, that is the one that would probably take the cake! If you like fancy boxes and a sleek-looking device, I would recommend this one. [5.0/5] Fantastic product, Exactly as described, highly recommended! Fantastic product, Exactly as described, highly recommended! [5.0/5] Very Impressed! The cooling effect is very nice. It makes a huge difference in the setting you can use. I am using this one on one leg, & a different one on the other leg. I will be sharing before & after pics, & comparison pics. This IPL hair remover device is extra nice. It is of high quality & the packaging is fit for royalty. Very impressed. I highly recommend this & it would make a very nice gift. [5.0/5] Good quality I am very satisfied with this Ulike IPL Permanent Hair Removal Device for Women and Men. First of all the packaging is so impressive. The set includes everything needed for at home environment use of the device. There are IPL hair removal device, a power cord, a power adapter, glasses, a razor, an instruction, and two lather cases for storing.
Everything is well-made and good quality.
The device is very easy to use. The instruction was very helpful and informative. The results will depend on skin type, treatment frequency and length.
I have white skin, and dark brown hair, and this type of hair removal works well for me. No more unwanted hair and ingrown hair.
I would definitely recommend this product for others. [4.0/5] Still trying it out: 4 times used I've used this device for over a week now, 4 times. Every other day as directed. I can not tell a difference yet. I've read that you need to be patient and give it time. I'm going to continue using as directed and updating. Packaging is amazing! You could tell it was poorly handled during shipping, but the packaging offered the protection it needed and there were no issues!

1 week review:
- The device is very easy to use. I can pull it out, plug it up, use the glasses that are included, and use it all in a very short amount of time. (I'm starting with my arm pits.)
- I love the cooling effect while using this! I have not used any other hair removal device before, but if it didn't have this cooling effect, I probably wouldn't continue using it. [5.0/5] I❤️the cooling tip on this device👍⭐️ This device comes in a very nice case for storage. The protective glasses 👓 even come in a very nice case. The directions are quite detailed so there is no need for me to discuss that in this review. If you purchase this device you’ll see.

Operating an IPL device is pretty simple if you follow the directions. It’s choosing the level, making sure you don’t miss a spot and having the patience/commitment to follow through with it to get the results you want.

I have seen reviews under many IPL hair removal devices that says they used it for a month and they didn’t see any results. Well, it does take time. Like I said, if you are committed, patience and consistent, then any IPL device will work. This particular device recommends using ONCE a week for 12 weeks, and then once a month there after for maintenance. Most people want to see results by snapping their fingers, and that just isn’t going to happen, even if you do go to a professional, and have it done, it takes time. My advice, if you are not in the mood to take the time, don’t have the patience and or not going to be committed, then don’t get one of these devices because you would be wasting your money.

It took about 4 weeks or 4 treatments before I really started to notice results. First noticed the hair on the underarms because it had become finer, thinner, softer hair that was growing. My bikini 👙 area had spots that the hair didn’t grow back but other spots where it was finer, thinner & softer hair. Even though I had spots with NO HAIR growing back, I still go over all the areas regardless. My left armpit has no hair growing at this time, but I still do a treatment. Once I get to the proper weeks since I first started the treatments, then and only then I will 🛑 treating areas where no hair grows.

My legs 🦵🏼 have been frustrating but it’s definitely working. The problem is that I miss areas each time I do a treatment. There’s no way of getting the entire leg each time. I have come up with a pattern I do that helps me the best. I start at my ankle and go around my leg 🦵🏼 in a circle ⭕️ while spiraling 🌀 up my leg. I found that going up and down is when I was missing the most. Doing a spiral has helped me tremendously.

On the days I am scheduled to do another treatment, I shave 🪒 the areas that I’m going to treat. I also exfoliate the areas using [[ASIN:B099HDG45M Revealer Skin Exfoliator]]. Then about an half hour after I shave 🪒, I start me treatments. KEEP YOUR LEGS DRY, CLEAN AND NO LOTIONS/OILS ETC. NOTHING.
ALWAYS WEAR THE PROTECTIVE 👓 GLASSES!
Since I shave my underarms first, I start there. Underarms takes about 2 minutes each. Then I do my bikini 👙 area and then onto my legs. If I think I forgot a spot I do go back and do it, but I really try to pay attention so I don’t. Once complete I either apply [[ASIN:B0B1N8Z7BR Reviver Skin Soothing Gel]] or [[ASIN:B073WVKRBN USDA Certified Jojoba Oil]]. Both are soothing, but sometimes I feel I need a decent moisturizer and Jojoba Oil is my go to for that.

Well, that’s how I do each treatment. I also put in my schedule/calendar📅 when I’m supposed to do my next treatment. It is time consuming, but the results are so worth it. Think off all the money you are going to save by NOT having to buy EXPENSIVE RAZORS 🪒 anymore. Not to mention the time saved in the shower 🚿.

HOPE THIS HELPS others understand a little of how it works. 👍I feel very comfortable using this device and knew going into it, this is a commitment and requires patience. [4.0/5] Powerful! It’s in the joules rating! I’ve tried so many at home IPL devices and have gotten hair removal at salons. The thing you need to check for is the power of each laser. For instance many cheap IPL will say there joules rating is between 2-6 joules typically. At salons it varies but it’s typically between 20-50 joules. And that means the higher the joules usually the better the results or faster because it’s actually hitting the hair with that higher power.

This IPL device has 5 levels between 6-20 joules. That is typically as high as you’ll find for at home IPL devices. So at the highest level you’ll get the low end of salon quality laser removal.

Be very careful with the higher levels though, just because it can reach that power doesn’t mean it will be the best result for your skin. So be careful, follow directions and make sure to not damage your skin [4.0/5] This Is one of the nicer ones Ive tried, But pricey. I have tried several of these over the past few months and while this is easily the best one, I personally don't think it is worth the 3 bills they are asking.

the retail packaging on this is fantastic and the hard shell box it comes in is a big bonus, but as far as the device itself it seems to be on par with some half this price. I personally would rather received it in a plain box to save a little money. The one little thing that Is super convenient that stands out is this has the proper size cable ties already on it and they're not Velcro! They are button snaps and that is a great thing because the Velcro ties get full of hair and fuzz.

And Like similar devices with the the cold touch thing it is a little weird the first time you feel it. because you think it feels warm but it's not, it just messes with your head a bit. And so far with this feature you can't really feel this one doing anything until you get a little overlap in the same session. So that is nice.

And with this one I have noticed some results.
I have been testing these on different small sections of my leg in the same area trying to get a consistent controlled test and I'm keeping track of how long it takes. I'm a big Burley guy so there's no shortage of hair on my legs. lol
So with this one after about 4 weeks using it twice a week I do see the hair thinning out a bit. But a couple devices half this price did the same thing. And it is definitely heating the hair. To make sure I tried it on an unshaved area and it definitely stings a little as the fully exposed hairs heat up. But, a couple others did this as well.

So is it worth it for you? Maybe. if you want a premium feel and look with everything like you bought it at Neiman Marcus, buy this one.
But if you just want hair removal and don't care about the packaging there are cheaper options available. [1.0/5] Only used it 3 times In the few weeks I've had this, I haven't noticed any difference in my hair quantity or thinness. When I reach the 12 week suggested use, then I will update my review [5.0/5] Coco’s Conclusion: Truly Painless, High Quality [[VIDEOID:b35db5602af2156947967b6b6850e6d3]] I have used a few different IPL machines over the years. This one is the first painless one I have had.
Everything is packaged well and comes in a nice case. The machine itself is very easy to use. Once you turn it on, it automatically turns on a cooling mechanism that makes it more pleasant on the skin and less likely to overheat, I would imagine. I would recommend that you read the directions or watch a video on how to operate it. It has different settings that you can change by clicking the right button. There is also a long or short area function on this which is very nice, making it so you can drag the device down a longer area, like a leg, while pressing the button.
The directions say to use the device want to eat for 12 weeks and after that, as needed. I will update the review if sufficient hair removal has not happened at this point in time, but I’m already noticing that I have to shave less. [4.0/5] Cools! Easy to Use - Very Comfortable to Hold! IT WORKS!!!! Current price $359.00. Beautifully packaged. Would make a wonderful xmas gift. Definitely much more convenient than going to the saloon. You get the device, electric cord, eye protection, shaver, and instructions all packaged in a lovely case. Very nice presentation. On/Off switch is on the side . Super simply to use! What's unique about this device is that it cools your skin while operating. No skin issues or sensitivity at all. I ordered it mainly to do my legs and it works great. You don't have to shave as often and there are a lot less hairs to shave! Does seem a bit expensive but I love it! [4.0/5] it's expensive but i love it Ulike Laser Hair Removal Device

Is this expensive? Yes, but compared to getting it done professionally, and spending 100s to 1000s of dollars with multiple sessions, it's actually saving money. You can also find cheaper devices; there are plenty others. I had a different device before this one, but this is much more functional and aesthetically pleasing as well. It comes in really nice packaging with the device/adapter, razor, and protective eyeglasses with case, but no additional attachments. If you don't like reading manuals, you can also head to their Instagram page.

It's quite easy to use: just put your protective eyeglasses on, plug the device in, hold power button to turn on/off, and you're good to go. I do both legs, 1-3x a week (while watching TV). Make sure you shave beforehand. There are 5 intensity levels depending on body area (face-1, bikini-2, armpit-3, arms-4, legs-5) as well as recommended times for each body area also. I prefer Continuous Play Mode so the device automatically flashes every few seconds, versus Single Play Mode where you manually press for each flash. Love the cooling technology/sensation. [4.0/5] If it works it’s totally worth it, but does it? This Ulike Hair Removal Device seams to be well made, it doesn’t feel cheap or flimsy at all. The issue is that it will take months of use to be able to see actual results. Being that I have only been using this for a few weeks I can’t speak as to if it works.

But I can speak to the ease of use and quality. It’s pretty simple to use and has some extra features that are not necessary, but so make it nicer to use like the cooling feature that helps the quick zap not feel as harsh. I will definitely be updating this after a few months to inform if it is in fact working. It’s definitely a commitment, but if it works it’s totally worth it. [5.0/5] COMPATIBILITY (must read) One significant issue that this listing did not address is compatibility. IPL's are not effective for all skin and hair color types. Please research online as there are several infographics on how effective laser therapy is on each color type. This is the main reason why some reviews rave about the results and some are so disappointed.
That being said...
This is the most compact IPL device that I've tried, but it packs all the new features you are looking for. I personally have not reached the intensity where I need the cooling function, but it's nice knowing it's there when I reach that point. I do like the compact size, but wish there was more grip to the exterior. Everything is smooth and I came close to dropping the thing the first time I used it. So be careful handling it. One of the newer trends on these devices is to have the invisible screen, instead of a visible LCD screen. When you turn it on, the data lights are under the gold rectangle and illuminate to show the functions etc.
I personally have had great success with IPL devices, since I fit the designated hair and skin color. Hair hardly, if at all, grows back in the targeted areas... but it does take some time to see results. You will notice reduced grow back rates after 2 weeks, then more significant results after 4-6 months.

response:
Here is a summary of the product reviews for the Ulike IPL Hair Removal Device:

Most customers are happy with the product, giving it mostly 4 and 5 star ratings. The packaging and presentation are frequently praised, with many noting it would make a great gift. The cooling feature is a standout highlight for nearly all reviewers, making treatments more comfortable and allowing for higher intensity settings.

The device is generally considered easy to use and comes with useful accessories including protective eyeglasses, a razor, and a storage case. Several reviewers note that the 5 intensity levels, ranging up to 20 joules, put it among the more powerful at-home IPL devices available.

The most common theme across reviews is that patience and consistency are essential. Most users begin seeing results after 4 to 12 weeks of regular use, with common results including finer, thinner hair and reduced regrowth. Several reviewers caution that no home IPL device will deliver complete permanent hair removal.

On the downside, some reviewers feel the device is overpriced compared to similar products, and one reviewer noted the lack of smaller attachments for sensitive areas like the upper lip. One reviewer also raised an important point about compatibility, noting that IPL devices work best on people with lighter skin and darker hair.

Overall, most buyers would recommend the product to others, particularly those who are committed to a consistent treatment routine.
